title: Interview with Dr. Dipanwita Banerjee — Gynaecological Oncologist
description: Dr. Dipanwita Banerjee speaks about gynaecological cancer care, early detection, and the importance of cervical cancer screening for women in India.

title: Virtual Session on Anaemia Mukt Bharat
description: As part of our National Awareness Campaign, this session brings together expert voices to highlight how Next Generation IV Therapy is reshaping treatment outcomes—faster, safer, and more impactful.

title: Cervical Cancer and Papillomavirus
description: Dr. Dipanwita Banerjee, Consultant, Gynaecological Cancer Surgeon, Chittaranjan National Cancer Institute shares her thoughts on India continuing to face a significant burden of HPV-related diseases, particularly cervical cancer, which remains the second most common cancer among women in the country. .
